package.name: mock_ur_visualization
package.description: Lightweight RViz visualization of a real or simulated UR robot. Polls the UR primary URScript port for joint angles and republishes them as sensor_msgs/JointState, then drives a robot_state_publisher + RViz pipeline. No ur_robot_driver / ros2_control required — works with URSim or a physical UR arm out of the box.
